title: Mask-Aware Policy Gradients for Diffusion Language Models
authors: Haran Raajesh, Kulin Shah, Adam Klivans, Philipp Krähenbühl
publish: arXiv
abstract: Reinforcement learning has proven effective for improving reasoning in large language models, but extending it to Masked Diffusion Language Models (MDLMs) remains challenging due to the intractability of the log-likelihood estimation. Existing approaches approximate this log-likelihood by modeling only the token predictions, ignoring the order in which positions are unmasked during generation. We observe that MDLM generation involves two decisions at each step: what tokens to place at each masked position and which positions to remask. We formalize this as a two-stage action MDP, showing that the policy gradient naturally decomposes into a token term and a masking term. Combining optimization of both terms leads to state-of-the-art outcomes on mathematical reasoning and coding benchmarks, with scores of 87.1% on GSM8K and 53.4% on MBPP.
title_zh: 面向扩散语言模型的掩码感知策略梯度
abstract_zh: 强化学习已被证明能有效提升大型语言模型的推理能力，但将其扩展到掩码扩散语言模型（MDLMs）仍具有挑战性，原因在于对数似然估计的不可解性。现有方法通过仅对令牌预测进行建模来近似该对数似然，而忽略了生成过程中掩码位置被解掩的顺序。我们观察到，MDLM的生成在每个步骤涉及两个决策：在每个掩码位置放置什么令牌，以及哪些位置需要重新掩码。我们将此形式化为一个两阶段动作马尔可夫决策过程，表明策略梯度自然分解为令牌项和掩码项。对这两项的联合优化在数学推理和编码基准上取得了最先进的结果，在GSM8K上达到87.1%，在MBPP上达到53.4%。

title: Leveraging Instruction Tuning and Merging for Reasoning Model Adaptation
authors: Yu-Du Feng, Niels Mündler-Sasahara, Mark Vero, Martin Vechev
publish: arXiv
abstract: Reasoning language models (RLMs) have demonstrated impressive performance in domains such as mathematics and coding. These domains permit reliable verification of model outputs, which is important for enabling the reinforcement learning that drives RLM performance gains. However, training RLMs on domains that lack reliable verifiers remains challenging. Meanwhile, for both verifiable and unverifiable domains, large amounts of unused supervised fine-tuning data with human-written solutions exist. In this work, we show that these data can be used efficiently to further improve RLM performance. For this, we first use classic instruction tuning, supervised fine-tuning without reasoning traces, on the RLM. Next, we merge our instruction-tuned model with the original reasoning model, recovering its reasoning behavior on the target domain. Our extensive evaluation demonstrates that our technique improves RLM performance in both verifiable and hard-to-verify domains, including coding and text summarization, while preserving RLM capabilities across other domains. Importantly, our method is highly cost-effective, enabling such improvements for less than USD $3.
title_zh: 基于指令微调和融合的推理模型适配
abstract_zh: 推理语言模型（RLM）在数学和编程等领域的表现令人瞩目。这些领域允许对模型输出进行可靠验证，这对于驱动RLM性能提升的强化学习至关重要。然而，在缺乏可靠验证器的领域训练RLM仍具有挑战性。与此同时，无论是在可验证领域还是不可验证领域，都存在大量未充分利用的、包含人工编写解决方案的有监督微调数据。在本研究中，我们证明了这些数据可被高效用于进一步提升RLM性能。为此，我们首先在RLM上应用经典的指令微调——即不包含推理轨迹的有监督微调。接着，我们将经过指令微调的模型与原始推理模型进行合并，从而恢复其在目标领域的推理行为。广泛的评估表明，我们的技术在可验证领域和难以验证的领域（包括编程和文本摘要）中均能提升RLM性能，同时保持RLM在其他领域的能力。重要的是，该方法极具成本效益，实现此类改进的成本不超过3美元。

title: Can LLMs Build a MaxSAT Solver from Papers? The CoreForge Experience
authors: Ruben Martins
publish: arXiv
abstract: We report on CoreForge, an experience in using large language models (LLMs) to build an unweighted MaxSAT solver from research papers rather than from an existing solver codebase. The project focuses on unsatisfiability-based MaxSAT algorithms and follows an iterative workflow that combines paper discussions with ChatGPT, implementation through Codex prompts, and repeated LLM-assisted code audits and revisions. Although the codebase implements several algorithms and solver components, our evaluation focuses on configurations that combine core-guided optimization, lightweight preprocessing, core minimization, integration with integer linear optimization backends, and a new core-sequence lookahead approach. Our experience suggests that LLMs can support solver implementation from papers, while requiring external validation, benchmarking, and human guidance. In our experiments, fuzzing and MaxSAT Evaluation instances did not reveal wrong answers in the tested configurations, although performance remains below the best hand-engineered MaxSAT solvers. We summarize what worked, what remained difficult, and the lessons for future LLM-assisted solver development.
title_zh: LLMs能否根据论文构建MaxSAT求解器？——CoreForge经验分享
abstract_zh: 我们报告了CoreForge的开发经验，这是一次利用大型语言模型（LLM）从研究论文而非现有求解器代码库构建无权重MaxSAT求解器的实践。该项目专注于基于不可满足性的MaxSAT算法，并采用迭代工作流，结合与ChatGPT的论文讨论、通过Codex提示进行实现，以及反复的LLM辅助代码审计与修订。尽管代码库实现了多种算法和求解器组件，但我们的评估重点在于结合核心导向优化、轻量级预处理、核心最小化、与整数线性优化后端的集成，以及一种新的核心序列前瞻方法的配置。经验表明，LLM能够支持从论文实现求解器，但需要外部验证、基准测试和人工指导。在我们的实验中，模糊测试和MaxSAT评估实例在测试配置中未发现错误答案，但性能仍低于最佳手工编写的MaxSAT求解器。我们总结了有效的方法、仍存在的困难，以及未来LLM辅助求解器开发的经验教训。

title: Alipay-PIBench: A Realistic Payment Integration Benchmark for Coding Agents
authors: Shiyu Ying, Xuejie Cao, Yingfan Ma, Yuanhao Dong, Wenyu Chen, Bowen Song, Lin Zhu
publish: arXiv
abstract: Payment integration is a demanding repository-level software task: agents must select a suitable product, implement coordinated client-server flows, verify payment outcomes, and preserve consistency between transaction and business states. We introduce Alipay-PIBench, a benchmark for evaluating coding agents on realistic Alipay payment integration. It contains nine product-specific projects and 18 task instances, each organized into Basic functional-completion and Advanced risk-aware hardening scenarios. Scenario-specific rubrics support deterministic static, unit, integration, and end-to-end checks, supplemented by LLM-assisted assessment for semantic requirements. We evaluate six coding-agent models and report rubric pass rate (RPR). Under the with-skill condition, mean RPR ranges from 68.58% to 91.37%. Access to the alipay-payment-integration skill improves mean RPR by 10.31 percentage points on average relative to the without-skill condition, with gains varying across models, products, and scenarios. Method-level results distinguish source-level completion, executable payment behavior, and payment-domain requirements. Alipay-PIBench provides a controlled setting for diagnosing model capability and evaluating structured guidance in payment integration.
title_zh: 支付宝-PIBench：面向编码智能体的现实支付集成基准
abstract_zh: 支付集成是一项要求较高的仓库级软件任务：智能体必须选择合适的支付产品，实现协调的客户端-服务器流程，验证支付结果，并保持交易状态与业务状态的一致性。我们推出Alipay-PIBench，这是一个用于评估编码智能体在真实支付宝支付集成场景中表现的基准测试。它包含九个特定产品的项目及18个任务实例，每个实例分为基础功能完成型和高级风险感知加固型场景。场景特定的评分标准支持确定性静态检查、单元测试、集成测试和端到端检查，并辅以大语言模型辅助评估语义需求。我们评估了六个编码智能体模型，并报告了评分标准通过率（RPR）。在具备技能条件下，平均RPR范围为68.58%至91.37%。与无技能条件相比，接入支付宝支付集成技能使平均RPR平均提高10.31个百分点，提升幅度因模型、产品和场景而异。方法级结果区分了源码级完成、可执行支付行为以及支付领域需求。Alipay-PIBench为诊断模型能力以及评估支付集成中的结构化指导提供了受控环境。

title: MM-IssueLoc: A Controlled Benchmark for Evaluating Visual Evidence in Multimodal Repository-Level Issue Localization
authors: Shaoxiong Zhan, Shi Hu, Boyu Feng, Hai Lin, Andrew Gong, Zhengda Zhou, Jiaying Zhou, Yunyun Hou, Hao Su, Hai-Tao Zheng
publish: arXiv
abstract: Real repository issues routinely include visual evidence such as screenshots, error dialogs, rendered UI states, and logs, yet repository-level issue localization is evaluated mostly as a text-only task. Existing multimodal SE benchmarks evaluate end-to-end repair, entangling localization with patch synthesis and obscuring whether visual input helped, hurt, or was ignored. We introduce \textbf{MM-IssueLoc}, a controlled benchmark and evaluation protocol for repository-level localization with visual evidence. MM-IssueLoc contains 652 issue-PR instances across 23 languages, with annotations for 7 image categories and 4 relevance levels. It provides file-level and function-level gold labels, paired text-only and with-image evaluation, and VCE-based diagnostics that convert images into structured textual evidence. We evaluate LLM-based and retrieval-based systems, including MM-IssueLoc-VL-Emb as a controlled multimodal retriever. Results show that existing systems remain far from reliable multimodal repository localization: the strongest agent reaches 38.96 file Acc@5 and 22.45 function Acc@10, while the strongest retriever reaches 33.86 function Acc@10. Cross-benchmark comparisons show that high localization scores on text-dominant SWE benchmarks do not transfer cleanly to multimodal issue localization. MM-IssueLoc turns visual evidence into an explicit evaluation variable, enabling future work to test whether systems improve by using visual evidence for localization, rather than by relying on text-only cues or downstream patch-generation effects.
title_zh: MM-IssueLoc：一个用于评估多模态仓库级问题定位中视觉证据的受控基准
abstract_zh: 实际仓库问题通常包含截图、错误对话框、渲染的UI状态和日志等视觉证据，然而仓库级问题定位大多仅作为纯文本任务进行评估。现有的多模态软件工程基准测试评估端到端修复，将定位与补丁合成纠缠在一起，模糊了视觉输入是否有帮助、有害或被忽略。我们提出 **MM-IssueLoc**，一个用于带视觉证据的仓库级定位的受控基准测试和评估协议。MM-IssueLoc 包含跨23种语言的652个issue-PR实例，标注了7个图像类别和4个相关性级别。它提供文件级和函数级的金标准标签、配对纯文本和带图像评估、以及基于VCE的诊断方法，将图像转换为结构化文本证据。我们评估了基于LLM和基于检索的系统，包括作为受控多模态检索器的MM-IssueLoc-VL-Emb。结果表明，现有系统远未达到可靠的多模态仓库定位：最强的智能体达到38.96的文件Acc@5和22.45的函数Acc@10，而最强的检索器达到33.86的函数Acc@10。跨基准比较表明，在文本主导的SWE基准上的高定位分数无法直接迁移到多模态问题定位。MM-IssueLoc将视觉证据转化为明确的评估变量，使未来工作能够测试系统是否通过使用视觉证据进行定位而改进，而不是依赖纯文本线索或下游补丁生成效果。

title: Setup Complete, Now You Are Compromised: Weaponizing Setup Instructions Against AI Coding Agents
authors: Aadesh Bagmar, Pushkar Saraf
publish: arXiv
abstract: AI coding agents set up projects by reading documentation and installing the dependencies it lists, without verifying their names, sources, or known vulnerabilities. By editing only a README, requirements file, or Makefile, an attacker can redirect the agent to an untrusted registry, a known-vulnerable version, or a wrong-but-plausible name: documentation becomes a vector for code execution. We present the first systematic evaluation of package-install-time supply-chain attacks delivered through ordinary project-setup documentation across production coding-agent harnesses, probing frontier models on twelve scenarios in five attack classes, grounded in documented incidents. The same model catches an attack through one harness and installs it through another: install-time security rests on the harness-model combination, not the model alone. Agents catch blatant typosquats reliably, but plausible separator-confusion names (azurecore for azure-core) slip through, and how often depends on the harness-model pairing. Source-based attacks like registry redirection are missed almost everywhere. The source blind spot recurs on npm and Cargo, where nearly every model installs the untrusted dependency; name detection carries over less consistently across ecosystems. Security-oriented prompts recover part of the gap but only for the dimension they name; a deterministic pre-install check that verifies names, sources, and versions before any code runs closes most of it.
title_zh: 设置完成，您已被攻陷：将设置指令武器化以对抗AI编码代理
abstract_zh: AI代码代理通过阅读文档并安装其中列出的依赖项来设置项目，而不验证其名称、来源或已知漏洞。攻击者只需修改README、依赖文件或Makefile，就能将代理重定向到不受信任的注册表、已知存在漏洞的版本或名称相似但错误的内容：文档成为了代码执行的载体。我们首次对生产级代码代理框架中通过常规项目设置文档发起的包安装时供应链攻击进行了系统评估，基于已记录的事件，在五类攻击的十二个场景中测试了前沿模型。同一模型在一个框架中能捕捉到攻击，在另一个框架中却会安装攻击：安装时的安全性取决于框架-模型的组合，而非仅模型本身。代理能可靠地捕捉明显的拼写错误，但合理的分隔符混淆名称（如用azurecore代替azure-core）却能蒙混过关，其成功率取决于框架-模型的配对。类似注册表重定向的源攻击几乎在所有地方都被忽略。在npm和Cargo上，源盲点反复出现，几乎所有模型都会安装不受信任的依赖项；名称检测在不同生态系统间的一致性较低。面向安全的提示能部分弥补这一差距，但仅针对其命名的维度；在代码运行之前对名称、来源和版本进行确定性预安装检查，能封堵大部分漏洞。

title: The Distributed Open-Source Vulnerability Ecosystem
authors: Peter Mandl, Paul Mandl
publish: arXiv
abstract: Identifying known software vulnerabilities is a central task in software supply chain security management. Although publicly available vulnerability information is based on shared standards, different vulnerability scanners often report divergent results for identical software inventories. These differences do not arise solely from individual data sources or scanner implementations. They can emerge at several stages of the open-source vulnerability ecosystem. This paper presents a conceptual framework that describes vulnerability management as a distributed process of information exchange and transformation. It traces vulnerability information from its creation and standardization through enrichment to context-dependent interpretation. The analysis identifies heterogeneous information sources, divergent identity and version models, temporal change, and context-dependent assessment as major causes of inconsistent scanner findings. It then discusses the implications for interpreting analysis results, designing reproducible evaluation methods, and handling dynamic vulnerability knowledge in practice.
title_zh: 分布式开源漏洞生态系统
abstract_zh: 识别已知软件漏洞是软件供应链安全管理的核心任务。尽管公开的漏洞信息基于共享标准，但不同的漏洞扫描器对相同的软件清单往往会报告不同的结果。这些差异并非仅源于个体数据源或扫描器实现，它们可能在开源漏洞生态系统的多个阶段出现。本文提出了一个概念性框架，将漏洞管理描述为信息交换与转换的分布式过程。它追溯了漏洞信息从创建、标准化到丰富化及情境化解释的全过程。分析确定了导致扫描结果不一致的主要原因包括：异构信息源、不一致的身份与版本模型、时间变化以及情境依赖性评估。随后，本文探讨了这些因素对解读分析结果、设计可复现的评估方法以及在实际中处理动态漏洞知识所带来的启示。

title: Routing Ceilings Are Domain-Independent: Structural Prior Injection in Code Security Vulnerability Detection
authors: Manuel Israel Cázares
publish: arXiv
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) exhibit a well-documented gap between latent capability and consistent activation: the router hypothesis posits that models possess the knowledge to solve a task but lack reliable internal routing to activate it. Prior work in formal mathematical reasoning (SAIR, Cázares 2026) reports that structural priors (cheatsheets) raise in-distribution performance dramatically, yet collapse below the zero-shot baseline out-of-distribution (OOD) -- and that iterative recalibration amplifies rather than corrects the collapse. We test whether this phenomenon is cross-domain by reproducing the SAIR design in source-code security vulnerability detection, evaluating three LLMs (GPT-OSS-120B, Llama-3.3-70B, Gemma-4-31B) across three vulnerability categories (CWE-798, CWE-284, and the non-CWE N+1 anti-pattern) spanning syntactic, contextual, and semantic complexity, then transferring cheatsheet-augmented prompts to real-world CVE data from VUDENC (CWE-89, CWE-22). Our findings replicate and extend SAIR: (F1) structural priors lift semantic-vulnerability recall from 20.0% to 100.0% across all models; (F2) zero-shot performance degrades along a semantic complexity gradient; (F3) the same cheatsheets that saturate synthetic performance amplify distribution-shift collapse on real CVE data (CWE-89: 100% synthetic F1 to 48.9% on VUDENC, -51.1pp); (F5) iterative recalibration produces a v2 cheatsheet that performs worse than v1 on real data, mirroring SAIR's AN45c-vs-AN38 finding. These results provide evidence that the cross-distribution trade-off surface documented in SAIR generalises to code security, and that the router hypothesis is cross-domain. We argue the structural nature of the collapse motivates distribution-aware training over prompt calibration. Code and evaluation scripts: https://github.com/bytepro-ai/bitcoder-v2-research
title_zh: 路由天花板是领域无关的：代码安全漏洞检测中的结构先验注入
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLMs）在潜在能力与一致激活之间呈现出广泛记录的反差：路由器假说认为，模型拥有解决问题的知识，但缺乏可靠的内部路由来激活这些知识。此前在形式数学推理（SAIR，Cázares 2026）领域的研究报告指出，结构先验（作弊表）能显著提升分布内性能，但在分布外（OOD）场景下却崩溃至低于零样本基线，且迭代重校准反而加剧而非纠正这种崩溃。我们通过将SAIR设计复现到源代码安全漏洞检测中来检验该现象是否跨领域，评估了三种LLM（GPT-OSS-120B、Llama-3.3-70B、Gemma-4-31B）在三个漏洞类别（CWE-798、CWE-284以及非CWE的N+1反模式）上的表现，这些类别涵盖句法、上下文和语义复杂度，然后将增强作弊表的提示迁移至VUDENC中的真实CVE数据（CWE-89、CWE-22）。我们的发现复现并扩展了SAIR：(F1) 结构先验使所有模型在语义漏洞上的召回率从20.0%提升至100.0%；(F2) 零样本性能沿语义复杂度梯度下降；(F3) 使合成性能饱和的同一作弊表在真实CVE数据上加剧了分布偏移崩溃（CWE-89：合成F1为100%，在VUDENC上降至48.9%，下降51.1个百分点）；(F5) 迭代重校准产生的v2作弊表在真实数据上表现比v1更差，与SAIR中AN45c-vs-AN38的发现一致。这些结果证明，SAIR中记录的跨分布权衡曲面可推广至代码安全领域，且路由器假说具有跨领域性。我们认为，崩溃的结构性本质促使我们采用分布感知训练而非提示校准。代码与评估脚本：https://github.com/bytepro-ai/bitcoder-v2-research

title: Are LLM-Generated GPU Kernels Production-Ready? A Trace-Driven Benchmark and Optimization Agent
authors: Lingyun Yang, Yuxiao Wang, Shenghao Liang, Linfeng Yang, Daocheng Ying, Chunbo You, Rui Zhang, Luping Wang, Yinghao Yu, Guodong Yang, Liping Zhang
publish: arXiv
abstract: Existing GPU kernel generation benchmarks draw problems from synthetic or curated sources that diverge from deployed workloads. We present Atrex-Bench, a benchmark whose 30 operators and 440 shapes are sampled directly from full-cluster production inference traces of compute-limited, memory-rich GPUs. Each problem carries an importance weight derived from its share of observed GPU time, weighted by application card-hours and computed separately for the serving phases in which it runs, together with a per-problem roofline ceiling, so the aggregate score emphasizes the kernels that consume the most serving time. Evaluating six frontier coding agents on Atrex-Bench shows that even the best vanilla model reaches only ${\sim}10\%$ of the hardware roofline on production operators; and correctness alone overstates capability, since much of the apparent pass rate comes from PyTorch fallbacks rather than kernels the model wrote. To close this gap, we co-release Atrex-Kernel-Agent (AKA), a profile-driven kernel-optimization agent that combines iterative measure-revise search, optimization dropout for escaping stalled search contexts, and a layered GPU-optimization knowledge base (298 reference-kernel files and 244 optimization-knowledge documents, plus external upstream reference projects for API/ISA lookup). In a controlled case study, the agent converts zero-FlyDSL fallbacks into real kernels that match or exceed hand-tuned production baselines.
title_zh: 大语言模型生成的GPU内核是否可用于生产？一种基于追踪的基准测试与优化代理
abstract_zh: 现有的GPU内核生成基准测试从合成或策展来源中提取问题，这些来源与部署的工作负载存在差异。我们提出了Atrex-Bench，这是一个基准测试，其30个操作符和440种形状直接来自计算受限、内存丰富的GPU的全集群生产推理轨迹。每个问题都有一个重要性权重，该权重源自其观察到的GPU时间份额，按应用程序卡时加权，并针对其运行的提供服务阶段单独计算，同时附带每个问题的roofline上限，因此总得分突出了消耗最多提供服务时间的内核。在Atrex-Bench上评估六个前沿编码智能体表明，即使是最好的普通模型也只能达到生产操作符上硬件roofline的大约10%；仅凭正确性就夸大了能力，因为大部分明显的通过率来自PyTorch的回退，而非模型编写的内核。为了弥补这一差距，我们共同发布了Atrex-Kernel-Agent（AKA），这是一个基于性能分析驱动的内核优化智能体，它结合了迭代测量-修正搜索、用于逃离停滞搜索状态的优化丢弃机制，以及分层GPU优化知识库（包含298个参考内核文件和244个优化知识文档，外加用于API/ISA查询的外部上游参考项目）。在一个受控的案例研究中，该智能体将零FlyDSL回退转换为与手工调优的生产基线相匹配甚至超越的真实内核。

title: Automated Template-free Synthesis of Instruction-Centric Leakage Contracts for Black-Box CPUs
authors: Elvira Moreno, Tiziano Marinaro, Ryan Williams, Marco Patrignani, Roberto Guanciale, Hamed Nemati, Marco Guarnieri
publish: arXiv
abstract: Side-channel attacks pose a significant security threat for modern computing platforms, because they exploit subtle discrepancies in CPU behaviors to leak sensitive information. To model the information leaked by a CPU via microarchitectural side-channels, recent work proposed leakage contracts: an ISA-level security abstraction that provides the foundations for secure CPU programming. Unfortunately, due to the complexity of current microarchitectures, devising a leakage contract for a CPU requires extensive manual effort and thus modern CPUs lack dedicated leakage contracts. We present a methodology to extract instruction-centric leakage contracts for major CPU architectures with minimal manual intervention. We implemented this technique in malcos, the first template-free tool that automates the synthesis of leakage contracts for black-box CPUs. We evaluate malcos on x86 and ARM CPUs, and show that the contracts it synthesizes are precise and sound with respect to all leaks observed during synthesis. Our results demonstrate that learning leakage contracts from black-box CPUs is feasible.
title_zh: 面向黑盒CPU的以指令为中心的泄露合约的自动化无模板合成
abstract_zh: 侧信道攻击对现代计算平台构成了严重的安全威胁，因为它利用CPU行为的细微差异来泄露敏感信息。为了建模CPU通过微架构侧信道泄露的信息，近期研究提出了泄漏契约：一种ISA级别的安全抽象，为安全的CPU编程提供了基础。然而，由于当前微架构的复杂性，为CPU设计泄漏契约需要大量人工工作，因此现代CPU缺乏专用的泄漏契约。我们提出了一种方法，以最少的人工干预提取主流CPU架构的指令级泄漏契约。我们将该技术实现于malcos中，这是首个无需模板即可自动为黑盒CPU合成泄漏契约的工具。我们在x86和ARM CPU上对malcos进行了评估，结果显示其合成的契约在合成过程中观察到的所有泄漏方面都是精确且可靠的。我们的结果表明，从黑盒CPU中学习泄漏契约是可行的。

title: Capturing and Exploiting Design Pattern Variability in Mobile Application Generation
authors: Ramón Peralta, Jose-Miguel Horcas
publish: arXiv
abstract: The increasing reliance on automatic code generation in mobile application development often leads to code that neglects fundamental design principles and architectural quality. In this work, we address this challenge by capturing and exploiting the inherent variability of software design patterns to systematically generate customizable and well-structured mobile applications. We propose the use of the Universal Variability Language (UVL) to explicitly model the structural and behavioral variation points of common design patterns, such as Singleton, Strategy, Observer, Adapter, and Factory Method. These models are integrated with reusable Jinja templates, enabling code generation in Swift. Our approach leverages Software Product Line (SPL) engineering principles, treating design patterns as configurable assets within a product line and supporting automated generation of custom design patterns. We also analyze the configuration space of the modeled patterns, offering insights into their variability complexity. By formalizing design pattern variability and embedding it into the generation process, our work bridges model-driven engineering with practical mobile development, promoting the production of maintainable, reusable, and architecturally sound applications.
title_zh: 移动应用生成中设计模式可变性的捕获与利用
abstract_zh: 移动应用开发中日益依赖自动代码生成，往往导致代码忽视基本设计原则和架构质量。在本研究中，我们通过捕捉并利用软件设计模式的内在可变性，系统化地生成可定制且结构良好的移动应用，以应对这一挑战。我们提出使用通用可变性语言（UVL）对常见设计模式（如单例、策略、观察者、适配器和工厂方法）的结构与行为变化点进行显式建模。这些模型与可复用的Jinja模板相结合，支持Swift代码生成。我们的方法借鉴软件产品线（SPL）工程原理，将设计模式视为产品线内可配置的资产，并支持自定义设计模式的自动化生成。此外，我们分析了所建模模式的配置空间，揭示了其可变性复杂度。通过将设计模式可变性形式化并嵌入生成过程，本研究桥接了模型驱动工程与实际移动开发，促进了可维护、可复用且架构合理的应用程序的产出。

title: Pattern-Guided Design Space Exploration for FPGA Accelerator Design
authors: Jialiang Zhang, Weiman Yan, Yuelin Zou
publish: arXiv
abstract: High-level synthesis (HLS) raises the abstraction level of FPGA accelerator design from hardware description languages to C/C++, but high-quality results still depend on schedule decisions such as pipelining, unrolling, tiling, reordering, and buffering. These decisions create a combinatorial design space, while many numerical kernels exhibit recurring computation patterns that suggest different optimization strategies. This paper presents PATTERNDSE, a lightweight pattern-guided design space exploration (DSE) framework for FPGA kernels written in Allo, a scheduling-oriented HLS programming system. PATTERNDSE maps recurring computation patterns, including elementwise maps, reductions, matrix-vector operations, matrix-matrix operations, and stencil-like updates, to compact schedule spaces. It then applies candidate schedules, validates functional correctness through LLVM execution, checks HLS C code generation, and uses a simple pattern-aware estimator to rank candidates before Vitis HLS synthesis. We evaluate PATTERNDSE on six representative kernels: vecadd, axpy, dot, matvec, gemm, and jacobi2d. Compared with an exhaustive-lite baseline, pattern-guided DSE reduces the number of HLS-evaluated candidates from 140 to 29, achieving a 4.83x overall search reduction and up to 12.0x reduction for individual kernels. Across all evaluated kernels, PATTERNDSE recovers the same best valid Vitis HLS latency as the exhaustive-lite baseline, demonstrating that computation-pattern information can prune unproductive schedule combinations while preserving high-quality HLS outcomes.
title_zh: 面向FPGA加速器设计的模式引导设计空间探索
abstract_zh: 高层次综合（HLS）将FPGA加速器的设计抽象层次从硬件描述语言提升至C/C++，但高质量的结果仍取决于流水线、循环展开、分块、重排序和缓冲等调度决策。这些决策形成了组合型设计空间，而许多数值计算核心展现出循环出现的计算模式，暗示了不同的优化策略。本文提出PATTERNDSE，一种轻量级的基于模式指导的设计空间探索（DSE）框架，适用于基于Allo（一种面向调度的HLS编程系统）编写的FPGA核心。PATTERNDSE将循环出现的计算模式（包括逐元素映射、归约、矩阵-向量运算、矩阵-矩阵运算以及类模板计算更新）映射为紧凑的调度空间。随后，它应用候选调度方案，通过LLVM执行验证功能正确性，检查HLS C代码生成，并使用简单的模式感知评估器在Vitis HLS综合前对候选方案进行排序。我们在六个代表性核心上评估了PATTERNDSE：vecadd、axpy、dot、matvec、gemm和jacobi2d。与穷举精简基线相比，基于模式指导的DSE将HLS评估的候选方案从140个减少至29个，实现了4.83倍的整体搜索缩减，单个核心最高达12.0倍缩减。在所有评估的核心中，PATTERNDSE恢复了与穷举精简基线相同的最佳有效Vitis HLS延迟，表明计算模式信息能够剪枝低效的调度组合，同时保持高质量的HLS结果。

title: A Continuous-Time Reinforcement Learning Framework for Fine-Tuning Discrete Diffusion Models
authors: Zikun Zhang, Jiayuan Sheng, David D. Yao, Wenpin Tang
publish: arXiv
abstract: We formulate reinforcement learning (RL) in continuous time with discrete state spaces and possibly arbitrary action spaces via a stochastic control approach, where the state dynamics are modeled as a controlled continuous-time Markov chain (CTMC). We consider policy optimization problems and derive the corresponding policy gradient methods, leading to continuous-time variants of proximal policy optimization (PPO) and group relative policy optimization (GRPO). As a primary application, we develop a complete continuous-time RL framework for fine-tuning score-based discrete diffusion models. The proposed framework enables reward-driven optimization without requiring differentiability on the reward signals. In contrast to the existing GRPO-based approaches that only rely on terminal rewards, our formulation allows intermediate reward or advantage signals to be incorporated throughout the denoising trajectory. Importantly, when specialized to masked diffusion models (MDMs), our framework encompasses a rich class of policy parameterizations over the vocabulary simplex with analytically tractable probability ratios, providing a unified perspective on exploration and policy optimization in MDMs. For masked diffusion large language models (dLLMs), we further propose trajectory subsampling techniques to efficiently estimate computationally prohibitive trajectory likelihoods, reducing the computational cost of computing per-position probability ratios. We showcase the effectiveness of our methods on both low-dimensional entropy-regularized optimization problems and RL post-training of dLLMs on mathematical reasoning and coding tasks.
title_zh: 一种用于微调离散扩散模型的连续时间强化学习框架
abstract_zh: 我们采用随机控制方法，在连续时间框架下，针对离散状态空间和可能任意动作空间的强化学习（RL）问题进行了系统研究，其中状态动态被建模为受控的连续时间马尔可夫链（CTMC）。我们聚焦于策略优化问题，推导了相应的策略梯度方法，从而得到了近端策略优化（PPO）和组相对策略优化（GRPO）的连续时间变体。作为主要应用，我们开发了一套完整的连续时间强化学习框架，用于微调基于分数的离散扩散模型。该框架能够在无需奖励信号可微性的前提下实现奖励驱动优化。与现有仅依赖最终奖励的GRPO方法不同，我们的公式允许在去噪轨迹中融入中间奖励或优势信号。重要的是，当专门应用于掩码扩散模型（MDMs）时，我们的框架涵盖了词汇单纯形上丰富的一类策略参数化方法，并具有解析可处理的概率比，为MDMs中的探索与策略优化提供了统一视角。针对掩码扩散大语言模型（dLLMs），我们进一步提出了轨迹子采样技术，以高效估计计算上难以处理的轨迹似然，从而降低计算每个位置概率比的成本。我们通过低维熵正则化优化问题，以及在数学推理和编程任务中对dLLMs进行RL后训练，展示了所提方法的有效性。

title: SYNAPSE: A Multi-LLM Orchestrated AI Tutor for Secure Software Development Education with Neurodivergent-First Design
authors: Giusy Ferrara, Ashkan Sami
publish: arXiv
abstract: Developers who maintain real systems must continually recognise and remediate vulnerabilities in existing code, yet this skill is rarely trained directly: secure software development is commonly taught only after programming fluency is acquired, and accessibility support is treated as a secondary concern, disadvantaging learners with ADHD and related executive-function differences. This paper presents SYNAPSE, a publicly deployed adaptive tutoring platform for Java, Python for cybersecurity, and secure software development. SYNAPSE coordinates Claude, GPT-4o, and Gemini through the Model Context Protocol, routing interactions by pedagogical intent under a three-stage Socratic hint policy. It exposes eighteen always-visible accessibility features and anchors practice in ShopSecure, a deliberately vulnerable web application mapped to six OWASP Top 10 (2021) categories, on which learners practise the detect-understand-remediate loop characteristic of software maintenance. A feasibility pilot with nineteen participants across neurodivergent and neurotypical cohorts returned a System Usability Scale score of 76.4 and engagement of 4.2/5, with comparable cognitive-load levels across cohorts. SYNAPSE is available at https://synapse-course.com; a screencast is available at https://youtu.be/9R17KC47qQI.
title_zh: SYNAPSE：一种面向安全软件开发教育、采用神经多样性优先设计的、多LLM编排的AI导师
abstract_zh: 维护真实系统的开发人员必须持续识别并修复现有代码中的漏洞，然而这一技能很少得到直接训练：安全软件开发通常仅在编程熟练后才被教授，而可访问性支持则被视为次要问题，这使得患有ADHD及相关执行功能差异的学习者处于不利地位。本文介绍SYNAPSE——一个面向Java、Python网络安全及安全软件开发的公开部署的适应性辅导平台。SYNAPSE通过模型上下文协议协调Claude、GPT-4o和Gemini，在三阶段苏格拉底式提示策略下根据教学意图路由交互。它展示了18项始终可见的可访问性功能，并将练习锚定在ShopSecure中——这是一个故意存在漏洞的Web应用程序，映射了OWASP Top 10（2021年）的六个类别，学习者在此练习软件维护中典型的"检测-理解-修复"循环。一项涉及神经多样性和神经典型性群体共19名参与者的可行性试点研究显示，系统可用性量表得分为76.4，参与度为4.2/5，且两组群体的认知负荷水平相当。SYNAPSE可通过https://synapse-course.com 访问；屏幕录像可通过https://youtu.be/9R17KC47qQI 观看。

title: Democratizing Agent Deployment Safety: A Structural Monitoring Approach
authors: Preeti Ravindra, Rahul Tiwari, Vincent Wolowski
publish: arXiv
abstract: AI software development agents are increasingly capable of modifying infrastructure and security critical systems, creating risks where an agent completes its assigned task while covertly weakening safeguards through actions such as broadening permissions, degrading logging, or introducing persistence mechanisms. While frontier laboratories may deploy sophisticated monitoring pipelines, many organizations and individual users adopting coding agents lack the resources and governance maturity required to maintain complex learned monitor ensembles. We study this problem as infrastructure level sabotage under task success in the infrastructure-as-code setting from ControlArena and compare trained and untrained monitors across synchronous and asynchronous deployment modes. We introduce an Information Flow Graph (IFG) monitor that analyzes structural security regressions using control-flow and data-flow graph diffs alongside raw code diffs. In asynchronous evaluation, an untrained git diff monitor misses 11.6% attacks at 1% false positive rate auditing budget, our untrained IFG monitor reduces this to 3.5%, and the trained Async RF monitor achieves below 1%. Unlike the trained Async RF monitor, IFG can also operate synchronously as a pre-deployment safeguard that blocks suspicious infrastructure changes before execution or merge. In synchronous mode, IFG realtime rollback reduces joint main task and covert task success from 74.4% to 0.0% with no measurable reduction in legitimate task completion. These results suggest that untrained structural monitors provide a practical and auditable path toward democratizing deployment safety for organizations seeking trustworthy adoption of advanced AI agents.
title_zh: 普及智能体部署安全：一种结构监测方法
abstract_zh: AI软件开发代理日益具备修改基础设施和关键安全系统的能力，从而带来风险：代理在完成分配任务的同时，可能通过扩大权限、削弱日志记录或引入持久化机制等行为秘密削弱安全防护。尽管前沿实验室可能部署复杂的监控管道，但许多采用编码代理的组织和个人用户缺乏维护复杂学习型监控集成所需的资源和治理成熟度。我们基于ControlArena中的基础设施即代码场景，将这一问题定义为"任务成功下的基础设施级破坏"，并比较了同步与异步部署模式下的训练型和非训练型监控。我们引入了一种信息流图（IFG）监控器，通过控制流和数据流图差异对比原始代码差异，分析结构性安全退化。在异步评估中，未训练的git差异监控器在1%假阳性率审计预算下漏检11.6%的攻击，而我们的未训练IFG监控器将此比例降至3.5%，训练后的异步随机森林（Async RF）监控器则低于1%。与训练后的Async RF监控器不同，IFG还可以作为同步的预部署安全防护，在执行或合并前阻止可疑的基础设施变更。在同步模式下，IFG实时回滚将联合主任务与隐蔽任务的成功率从74.4%降至0.0%，且对合法任务的完成无显著影响。这些结果表明，未训练的结构化监控器为寻求可信采用先进AI代理的组织提供了一条实用且可审计的路径，有助于实现部署安全的民主化。

title: Proof-or-Stop: Don't Trust the Agent, Trust the Evidence -- Loop Engineering for Verifiable Evidence-Gated Lifecycle Control
authors: Jek Huang, Jeffery Hsia, Jiayi Sun, Freddie Shi, Wei Huang, Ian H. White
publish: arXiv
abstract: Autonomous coding agents increasingly execute multi-step software work, but lifecycle states such as reviewed, tested, DONE, and ready-to-merge remain claims unless supported by current evidence. We present Proof-or-Stop Lifecycle Control, a method that permits lifecycle transitions only when fresh, tracked-source-state-bound, mechanically verifiable evidence satisfies the relevant gate. The method treats agent outputs as claims rather than lifecycle state, and uses proof operationally to mean gate-admissible evidence under a stated trust model, not semantic program correctness. We evaluate an open-source implementation through mechanism tests, a powered control-policy ablation, and operated self-application evidence. The unattended-loop engine passed 10 of 10 scenarios with zero false-DONE, and local-key receipt bundles rejected 18 tamper classes with zero false accepts. In a 9,240-cell ablation, the pre-registered A4 versus A2-prime comparison reduced visible-pass/hidden-fail amplification from 31 of 1,800 injected cells under a compute-budgeted naive loop to 2 of 1,800 under the gated loop, a 1.6 percentage-point improvement in not-amplified rate with a 95 percent confidence interval of [0.8, 2.5]. A near-compute A3 versus A4 comparison, 14 of 1,800 versus 2 of 1,800, indicates that the gain is associated with enforcing review as a lifecycle gate rather than merely adding a reviewer. The self-application corpus contains 565 stories and 1,007 review findings, with 94.8 percent resolved, plus a 68-row high/critical cross-vendor exhibit. These results support Proof-or-Stop as a model-agnostic, host-neutral control layer for deciding which autonomous-agent claims a lifecycle may act on. The evaluation is limited to one model family, 24 ablation tasks, and a self-hosted corpus.
title_zh: 证明或停止：不要信任代理，信任证据——循环工程实现可验证的证据门控生命周期控制
abstract_zh: 自主编码代理越来越多地执行多步骤软件工作，但如已审阅、已测试、已完成和准备合并等生命周期状态，除非有当前证据支持，否则仍只是声明。我们提出了“证明或停止”生命周期控制方法，该方法仅当新鲜、可追踪源状态绑定、机械可验证的证据满足相关门控条件时，才允许生命周期转换。该方法将代理输出视为声明而非生命周期状态，并在操作上使用“证明”一词指代在特定信任模型下符合门控条件的证据，而非语义上的程序正确性。我们通过机制测试、带动力控制策略消融实验以及操作化的自我应用证据，评估了一个开源实现。无人值守循环引擎在10个场景中全部通过，且零误判为已完成，本地密钥收据包拒绝了18种篡改类别，零误接受。在9,240个单元的消融实验中，预先注册的A4与A2-prime比较，将可见通过/隐藏失败放大率从计算预算限制下朴素循环的1,800个注入单元中的31个，降低到门控循环下的1,800个中的2个，未放大率提高了1.6个百分点，95%置信区间为[0.8, 2.5]。一个近计算量的A3与A4对比（1,800个中的14个对比1,800个中的2个）表明，这种改进与将审阅强制作为生命周期门控有关，而不仅仅是增加一个审阅者。自我应用语料库包含565个故事和1,007个审阅发现，其中94.8%已解决，外加一个68行的高/关键跨供应商示例。这些结果支持“证明或停止”作为一种模型无关、主机中立的控制层，用于决定生命周期可以作用于哪些自主代理声明。评估仅限于一个模型家族、24个消融任务和一个自托管语料库。

title: Differentiable Routability-Driven Package Floorplanning with Pin Assignment
authors: Yiqi Huang, Zepeng Li, Zhen Zhuang, Kehao Chen, Genggeng Liu, Tsung-Yi Ho
publish: arXiv
abstract: As advanced packaging technology evolves, increasing interconnect density in redistribution layers (RDLs) makes routability critical to package floorplanning. Meanwhile, power integrity requirements often reserve fan-in regions for the power delivery network (PDN), forcing signal nets through fan-out regions and complicating routability estimation. Existing uniform grid-based congestion models cannot accurately characterize fan-out congestion, while previous pin assignment methods struggle to evaluate net crossings. We propose a differentiable routability-driven floorplanning and pin assignment algorithm for advanced packaging with fan-out routing. First, a differentiable wirelength minimization method directly models discrete chip orientations and back-propagates wirelength gradients to chip locations and orientations. It reduces wirelength under fixed pin selection while avoiding the bias of continuous-angle modeling. Second, a crossing-aware pin assignment method incorporates net-crossing cost into a multi-strategy DPSO algorithm and uses GPU-parallel cost evaluation to reduce wirelength efficiently. Finally, a differentiable routability maximization method constructs a congestion model tailored to fan-out routing and establishes a back-propagation path from congestion information to chip locations, thereby guiding routability optimization. Experimental results show that our method achieves 100% routability on all benchmarks. For cases successfully routed by the baselines, it reduces wirelength by up to approximately 23% compared with a leading floorplanning method equipped with our pin assignment flow.
title_zh: 可微分的可布线性驱动的封装布局规划与引脚分配
abstract_zh: 随着先进封装技术的发展，重分布层（RDL）中互连密度的不断增加使得布线可行性成为封装布局规划的关键因素。同时，电源完整性要求通常需为电源传输网络（PDN）预留扇入区域，迫使信号网络通过扇出区域，从而增加了布线可行性评估的复杂性。现有的基于均匀网格的拥塞模型无法准确描述扇出区域的拥塞情况，而以往的引脚分配方法也难以有效评估网络交叉问题。为此，我们提出了一种面向扇出布线的可微分布线驱动布局规划与引脚分配算法。首先，通过可微分线长最小化方法直接对离散芯片朝向进行建模，并将线长梯度反向传播至芯片位置与朝向，从而在固定引脚选择下减少线长，同时避免连续角度建模带来的偏差。其次，提出一种交叉感知的引脚分配方法，将网络交叉成本融入多策略离散粒子群优化（DPSO）算法中，并利用GPU并行成本评估高效降低线长。最后，构建一种可微分布线可行性最大化方法，设计针对扇出布线的拥塞模型，并建立从拥塞信息到芯片位置的反向传播路径，以指导布线可行性优化。实验结果表明，该方法在所有基准测试中均实现100%的布线可行性。对于基线方法成功布线的案例，与配备我们引脚分配流程的领先布局规划方法相比，线长最大减少约23%。

title: LQCDMaster: Agentic Scientific Computing for Lattice Quantum Chromodynamics Research
authors: Haofei Gao, Tingjia Miao, Wenkai Jin, Muhua Zhang, Hanzhang Wang, Jie Ran, Jinxin Tan, Zhentao Zhang, Bo Tang, Leiyi Li, Jun Hua, Xiangyu Jiang, Qi-An Zhang, Siheng Chen, Wei Wang
publish: arXiv
abstract: Lattice quantum chromodynamics (LQCD) provides a first-principles framework for computing hadronic observables, but its practical use remains limited by the substantial expertise required to turn research motivation into reliable computing workflows. Here we present \textsc{LQCDMaster}, a tool-augmented, skill-guided and domain-specialized scientific computing agent that converts natural-language LQCD research tasks into executable PyQUDA computing workflows, including measurement scripts, job-submission artifacts, execution logs and numerical outputs. The system combines agentic planning, expert-annotated LQCD skills and a deterministic Wick-contraction tool to constrain the algebraically fragile components of code generation. We evaluate \textsc{LQCDMaster} on a benchmark at the forefront of scientific research, comprising 70 LQCD computing tasks, with observables covering local and nonlocal two-point functions, Wilson loops, meson and baryon three-point functions. The generated workflows exactly reproduce expert-written implementations in 63 of 70 tasks at machine precision, with three additional discrepancies attributable to convention mismatches. Across representative observables, the agent reduces implementation time from hours to minutes while preserving end-to-end numerical validation. Further, we present a typical case of \textsc{LQCDMaster}-driven exploration: a lattice computation of light-cone distribution amplitudes with diagonal Wilson-line, a quantity accessible with standard methods but never before computed, and computation of the spectrum of proton, deuteron, triton, hyperon, hyperdeuteron and hypertriton. This work pioneers the paradigm of agentic scientific computing by automating the end-to-end scientific computing workflows in lattice QCD research, lowering its barrier and facilitating the exploration and verification of non-standard scientific ideas.
title_zh: LQCDMaster：用于格点量子色动力学研究的智能科学计算
abstract_zh: 格点量子色动力学（LQCD）为计算强子可观测量提供了第一性原理框架，但其实际应用仍受到巨大专业知识的限制——从研究动机到可靠计算工作流的转化需要大量专业经验。本文提出\textsc{LQCDMaster}，一种工具增强、技能引导且领域专业化的科学计算智能体，可将自然语言描述的LQCD研究任务转化为可执行的PyQUDA计算工作流，包括测量脚本、作业提交工件、执行日志和数值输出。该系统结合了智能体规划、专家标注的LQCD技能以及确定性Wick收缩工具，以约束代码生成中代数上脆弱的部分。我们在科研前沿的基准测试上对\textsc{LQCDMaster}进行了评估，该基准包含70项LQCD计算任务，可观测量涵盖局域和非局域两点函数、Wilson圈、介子和重子三点函数。生成的工作流在70项任务中有63项以机器精度完全复现了专家编写的实现，另有3处差异归因于惯例不匹配。在代表性可观测量上，该智能体将实现时间从数小时缩短至数分钟，同时保持了端到端的数值验证。此外，我们展示了\textsc{LQCDMaster}驱动的典型探索案例：对角Wilson线的光锥分布振幅进行格点计算（该量可通过标准方法获得但此前从未被计算过），以及质子、氘核、氚核、超子、超氘核和超氚核能谱的计算。这项工作开创了智能体科学计算的范式，通过自动化格点QCD研究中的端到端科学计算工作流，降低了其门槛，并促进了非标准科学思想的探索与验证。

title: Large Language Models for Code Generation from Multilingual Prompts: A Curated Benchmark and a Study on Code Quality
authors: Saima Afrin, Alessandro Midolo, Camilo Escobar-Velásquez, Mario Linares-Vásquez, Weiyuan Ding, Bowen Xu, Massimiliano Di Penta, Antonio Mastropaolo
publish: arXiv
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) perform differently on identical programming tasks when prompted in different natural languages, a phenomenon known as language bias. While this behavior has been widely studied for general text generation, its impact on code generation quality and programming conventions remains largely unexplored. We investigate how the language used to describe programming tasks affects the source code generated by GPT-4o mini, DeepSeek, and Claude. Our study comprises 460 coding tasks spanning Python (230) and Java (230). We translate and manually curate the original English prompts into Chinese, Hindi, Spanish, and Italian while preserving their technical meaning. We evaluate the generated code using multiple dimensions, including functional correctness through test pass rates, structural quality using established code metrics, issues detected by static analysis tools, and lexical characteristics such as the language used in identifiers and comments. Our results show that (i) English prompts do not consistently produce the best functional correctness or code quality, (ii) the impact of prompt language depends on both the programming language and the LLM, and (iii) generated code frequently mixes English with the prompt language in comments and string literals. These findings provide the first curated multilingual benchmark for studying language bias in code generation and offer insights for developing more robust multilingual code generation systems.
title_zh: 面向多语言提示的代码生成大型语言模型：一个精心策划的基准测试及代码质量研究
abstract_zh: 大语言模型（LLMs）在使用不同自然语言提示执行相同编程任务时表现不同，这一现象被称为语言偏见。尽管这种行为的普遍文本生成方面已得到广泛研究，但其对代码生成质量和编程惯例的影响仍鲜有探讨。我们研究了用于描述编程任务的语言如何影响GPT-4o mini、DeepSeek和Claude生成的源代码。本研究涵盖460个编程任务，包括Python（230个）和Java（230个）两种语言。我们翻译并人工整理了原始英文提示，将其转化为中文、印地语、西班牙语和意大利语，同时保留其技术含义。我们从多个维度评估生成的代码，包括通过测试通过率衡量的功能正确性、通过既定代码度量的结构质量、静态分析工具检测的问题，以及标识符和注释中使用的语言等词汇特征。结果表明：（i）英文提示并非始终能产生最佳的功能正确性或代码质量；（ii）提示语言的影响取决于编程语言和LLM本身；（iii）生成的代码在注释和字符串字面量中经常混合使用英语和提示语言。这些发现为研究代码生成中的语言偏见提供了首个经过人工筛选的多语言基准，并为开发更稳健的多语言代码生成系统提供了见解。

title: Bad Memory: Evaluating Prompt Injection Risks from Memory in Agentic Systems
authors: Soham Gadgil, David Alexander, Sai Sunku, Franziska Roesner
publish: arXiv
abstract: A growing class of agentic systems maintain persistent state across sessions through memory files, behavioral preferences, and knowledge bases. While this makes agents more useful and self-improving, it also creates a new attack surface for prompt injections in which malicious instructions can be embedded within persistent files and influence future behavior. In this work, we study prompt injection attacks in memory-based agentic systems using a sandboxed synthetic workspace. We evaluate two agentic systems, Anthropic Claude Code and OpenAI Codex, across four models: Claude Haiku 4.5, Claude Opus 4.7, GPT-5.2, and GPT-5.5. Our results show that although it is difficult to make an agent overwrite its own memory files using untrusted external content, payloads already planted in those files can successfully attack current and future sessions. Attack success and payload persistence vary substantially across systems, models, adversarial goals, and multi-session attack sequences. These findings show that persistent memory changes the threat model for prompt injection and motivate defenses that protect memory updates without removing useful agent adaptation.
title_zh: 不良记忆：评估智能体系统中来自记忆的提示注入风险
abstract_zh: 一个不断增长的智能体系统类别通过记忆文件、行为偏好和知识库在会话之间维持持久状态。虽然这使智能体更加有用且能够自我改进，但同时也为提示注入开辟了新的攻击面——恶意指令可嵌入持久文件中并影响未来行为。本研究在沙盒化的合成工作空间中，探讨了基于记忆的智能体系统中的提示注入攻击。我们评估了两个智能体系统（Anthropic Claude Code和OpenAI Codex）在四个模型（Claude Haiku 4.5、Claude Opus 4.7、GPT-5.2和GPT-5.5）上的表现。结果显示，尽管让智能体使用不可信的外部内容覆盖自身记忆文件较为困难，但已植入这些文件的有效载荷能够成功攻击当前及未来的会话。攻击成功率与载荷持久性因系统、模型、对抗目标及多会话攻击序列的不同而存在显著差异。这些发现表明，持久记忆改变了提示注入的威胁模型，并推动了在不削弱智能体有用适应能力的前提下保护记忆更新的防御措施。
